prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-MUSICALVIOLINTOY-PARENT Product Type: MUSICAL_INSTRUMENT_TOY Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: KidPlay Musical Violin Instrument Pretend Play Kids Light Up Toy (2 Colors) Description: Learn how to play the violin with the TychoTyke Light Up Beginner Violin Musical Toy for Kids

Learning a musical instrument is a great experience for children of all ages. The violin can be a noisy instrument and may be difficult for younger children to learn. For toddlers and preschoolers, a toy violin is a great alternative. Here, you will find a range of different styles of the violin to suit boys and girls of all ages and abilities The TychoTyke 12 melody Toy Violin with lights and sounds is a great choice for a kids beginner violin. It is ideal for toddlers, who will love watching the lights as they play. The toy is great for helping young kids learn about music, as it has 3 different activity modes and 12 built in song demos to suit all skill levels.

This violin is great for little girls and boys who love to make music. As well as playing sounds, it also lights up and features 3 different activity modes to ensure kids don't get bored. Toddlers can use the violin to create their own songs and rhythms just by pressing the buttons. This toy fiddle comes in a choice of either blue or pink, making it perfect for both boys and girls. It is easy to play - simply run the bow across the pad in the middle and the sounds will play. It is great for children to practice using the bow, in case they will learn to play a real violin as they get a bit older.

The children's violin toy weighs less than 1 pound, making it perfect for younger kids. It operates on (3) AA batteries, This toy is great for helping children learn about music from an early age. It is useful for developing your child's sense of rhythm, in a fun and interactive way.

The kid's violin is great for even the youngest musician Search Terms: musical toys rockstar toys kids instruments light up toys educational toys Features: - LIGHT UP ACTIVITY TOY VIOLIN: The TychoTyke 12 melody Toy Violin with lights and sounds is a great choice for a kids beginner violin. It is ideal for toddlers, who will love watching the lights as they play. - FUN AND EDUCATIONAL WITH A PURPOSE: Playing with the violin will allow your child to develop fine motor skills of handles, artistry, imagination and creativity. Hours of fun and excitement - DURABLE AND SAFE: The children's violin toy weighs less than 1 pound, making it perfect for younger kids. The kid's violin is great for even the youngest musician. It is strong and durable, so won't get damaged easily even with young toddlers who tend not to be the most careful with their toys12 Music Demo Sounds - CLASSICAL AND MODERN: The violin is one of the finest classical musical instruments. The violin can play a variety of notes and melodies, pre programed with 12 melodies and rhymes learning will be made fun Flashing Lights While in Use - Operates on (3) 1.5v AA Batteries | Suitable for ages 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
